new_tasks.title: Non-clinical pay uplift -- assess impact and timeline
new_tasks.description: Jasmin Khokhra has kicked off the non-clinical pay uplift project. UCEA communication is pending but calendars are filling up for the main holiday season. Kevin needs to assess the scope, timeline, and any PeopleXD/HR Systems implications.

new_tasks.title: DTP1092 Company 90 testing -- provide clarification and guidance
new_tasks.description: Crispin Muncaster is requesting clarification and guidance on Company 10/Company 90 user scenario testing. Tony Boydell has provided acceptance criteria. Kevin needs to respond with technical guidance on the testing approach.
